meaning: vt.引用,引证,提供,提出,报(价)
examples: We'll send you a quote without delay.
The poem is too long to quote in its entirety.
The aim of the competition is to match the quote to the person who said it.
" He was called a man with a pugnacious task who went through, quote, "A dizzying free-for-all.
